seoTitle: How to View Forms in TurboTax Online (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Learn how to view forms like W-2s and 1099s inside TurboTax Online, so you can review your return for accuracy before filing.
intro: If you've ever wanted to double-check exactly what's being reported on your tax return before you hit submit, knowing how to view your forms inside TurboTax Online is essential. This walkthrough shows you where to find and review documents such as W-2s and 1099s directly in the software, so you can catch mistakes early instead of after filing.

steps.heading: Get familiar with the TurboTax Online interface
steps.body: Start by orienting yourself in TurboTax Online so you know where form-related information lives within the platform.

steps.heading: Navigate to the forms view
steps.body: Follow the step-by-step path to open and view the specific forms that have been generated from your entered tax information.

steps.heading: Review key documents like W-2s and 1099s
steps.body: Check the details on forms such as your W-2 or 1099s to confirm the numbers match what was reported to you by employers or payers.

steps.heading: Verify accuracy before filing
steps.body: Reviewing forms carefully at this stage helps catch typos or missing information before you submit your return.

steps.heading: Use this for business and personal filing alike
steps.body: Whether you're tracking profit and loss as a small business owner or filing as an individual, viewing your forms gives you confidence that everything is accounted for.

faq.question: Can I view my forms in TurboTax Online before I finish filing?
faq.answer: Yes, TurboTax Online lets you access and review forms like W-2s and 1099s as you work through your return, not just at the end.

faq.question: Why should I check my forms manually instead of trusting the software?
faq.answer: Even though TurboTax automates much of the process, manually reviewing forms helps you catch data entry errors or missing documents before you file.

faq.question: Does viewing forms in TurboTax Online cost extra?
faq.answer: The video focuses on navigating to and reviewing forms within your existing TurboTax Online account, not on any additional paid features.

faq.question: Is this useful for small business owners as well as individuals?
faq.answer: Yes, small business owners can use the forms view to track profit and loss information, while individuals can use it to confirm personal income documents.
